reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room

reviews.title: Going for an interview at Pohang University of Science and Technology.
reviews.text:
Positive aspects
- I used the large room which had a dining table suitable for four people, making it convenient for students preparing for exams. 
- Breakfast is provided in the dining area on the first floor from 7 AM. When I mentioned my schedule, they adjusted it to 30 minutes earlier. They offered abalone porridge, simple side dishes, and toast, allowing for a convenient and quick meal.
- It was very convenient to catch the shuttle bus to Pohang University of Science and Technology from the bus terminal (in front of Homeplus) which is a 5-minute walk away. 

Negative aspects
- The price on days when exam students are using the facility is double the usual rate.
- The ceiling above the king-sized bed is covered with a large mirror.
- The temperature and airflow control of the ceiling-mounted air conditioner can only be done at the counter, requiring regular contact with the counter to make adjustments.
- The towel rack in the bathroom of the room I stayed in was broken and not repaired.
- The bathroom and toilet are separate, but the sink in front of the toilet cannot be used. It is inconvenient to go back and forth into the bathroom to wash hands after using the toilet.

Bad aspects
- The state of the air conditioner was poor; it was covered in dust.
- The air conditioner was old and made a rattling sound. When I asked for stronger airflow because it was cold, the noise became louder.
- Around midnight, I heard a dripping sound from the ceiling in the bathroom, and about 10 minutes later, it started pouring like a shower.
When I contacted the counter about the leak, they were not surprised and said everyone had gone home, so no action could be taken and someone would come in the morning.
The constant sound of water made it difficult to sleep, so I put several towels on the floor.
After about 30-40 minutes, the water stopped.
Looking at reviews on other sites, it seems that the same room had a leak from the bathroom ceiling reported in reviews from three years ago.
When checking out the next morning, I mentioned they should fix it, and they responded with a lifeless "Yes~~ Yes~~".
reviews.room_type: Twin Room with Breakfast for 2 (Heating system, King and Single Bed, Jetted Spa)

reviews.title: My boyfriend and I had a good stay overall. The staff was kind and the location was nice. I especially like the bathtub!

reviews.title: Dissatisfaction with hygiene and staff attitude.
reviews.text:
I went to Pohang for a one-day trip, and perhaps because I was in a hurry and booked a cheap accommodation without doing proper research, here’s what happened...

The accommodation had a damp smell, and the bedding was also damp, with sticky marks that looked like sticker residue on it, and there was some dust on top, so I requested to change the room. The staff seemed astonished and said they clean and change the bedding, so they couldn't change my room. Since I was just staying for one night, I thought I could overlook it, but the water had a smell, and overall, all the facilities felt old.

So far, it was cheap, and I was willing to let it go.

However, a really unpleasant incident occurred.

Due to my mistake, I left my luggage behind and realized it during my return, so I called the accommodation.

The cleaning staff said they didn't find it during cleaning. Since I had to leave it at the accommodation if I had forgotten it, I asked if it might have been left in the parking lot.

The staff said they couldn't confirm whether my luggage was in the parking lot since it was right inside, and they would leave a note for the CCTV person to check.

When I received no news the next day, I called directly. The staff informed me that according to the CCTV footage, I did not leave with my luggage when exiting the accommodation, and the cleaning staff didn't find my luggage either.

I couldn't understand how the luggage I took into the accommodation could not be brought out or found there.

I asked to be connected with the person responsible for the CCTV, but I was told that they couldn’t do that, and shortly after, I was told that they found it.

In just a few minutes, while checking the luggage, they even asked if a certain pattern on my handbag inside matched my belongings. 

Although it felt uncomfortable that someone had seen my luggage, finding it was my priority, so I didn’t press the issue.

I requested to have it shipped to me, but they refused citing the risk of damage. I then requested a postal service, but they said it couldn’t be paid on delivery.

Realizing from the staff's tone that they had no intention of helping, I told them I would pick it up if they would just hold it, and I eventually went to retrieve it.

Of course, I made a mistake by leaving my luggage behind, and if they had just found it quickly, it would have been fine, but the whole process was so unpleasant and difficult that I'm leaving a review.

Don’t expect good service from the staff.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room

reviews.title: A place without basics.
reviews.text:
I came to Pohang for a family trip. I booked a place with good reviews because my original accommodation was fully booked. Parking is convenient, and the bedding is nice. However, there are some major downsides. 

First, there is no bidet in the bathroom. 
Second, the heating is controlled at the counter, so I have to ask them to turn the heater on and off. It's very inconvenient. 
Third, there's no warm water, so I skipped showering. Only lukewarm water comes out when I ask for hot water. 

This is the worst accommodation I never want to visit again. It deserves not one star, but minus five stars. I didn't want to ruin the family trip, so I just left, but I hope they make improvements.

reviews.title: It is sufficient for its price
reviews.text: The interior of the hotel is bit old fashioned, yet the staff did their best to offer good conditions for our stay. Everything was nice, especially the low additional charge for our 5th friend who joined unexpectedly (only 20$ on top). I recommend for groups of friends to stay here, but not for a solo travelers, because it does seem a bit unsecured. It is a good option for traveling students on a budget.

reviews.title: If possible, try to write a bit more and go to another accommodation.
reviews.text: I've traveled abroad and stayed at various accommodations in the country, but it's my first time encountering a place with only one electrical outlet. Of course, there are plenty of USB ports, but they are of type A rather than the more common type C these days, so it would be quite alarming if you hadn't prepared the right cables in advance. Most shockingly, you cannot control the heating/cooling from the room. You have to call the front desk to turn the heater on or off. In the winter, after midnight, the heating is turned off. Breakfast is included, but there was no information about it during check-in, so I had to find out on my own. The only thing I was satisfied with was that the abalone porridge served at breakfast was delicious.
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: I heard the hotel was remodeled, but I'm not sure if it really was. The wind was strong, so I had to change rooms once. The new room had less wind, but it was basically cold. I told the front desk, and they turned on the heating for me, but they turned it off in the early morning, so it was cold again. The shower was broken in several places, and it was so cold that I had to shiver while washing. The restaurant staff was incredibly kind, but the offerings were too simple. There was nothing to eat apart from instant noodles, fried eggs, and cereal. This is the worst meal experience I've had while traveling. The cereal was just one type that I would feed my kids at home with milk, and that's all. I definitely do not recommend paying for the hotel breakfast. We stayed for two nights, and my middle school kids didn’t eat even once.

reviews.text: The building is a bit old, but the structure is slightly amusing, haha. However, it was clean and the spacious room made for a pleasant stay. The heating was very effective... I requested to lower it. The downside is that the bathroom and sink are separate, which is a bit inconvenient... Other than that, it’s really great for the price for family to come for a visit. It's also quick to get to Yeongildae Beach by car, so it's sufficient to book accommodation in the city.

reviews.title: An excellent hotel for a family. big beds, free toiletries readily available, very clean and great location to see Pohan
reviews.positives: size of room is amazing for a family. The beds were so comfortable and big. I love that the toiletries were readily available if you forget anything. The bathroom had a jacuzzi and kids were able to enjoy a bubble bath. There was always water for the whole family. The room was cleaned everyday!
reviews.negatives: The small fridge was dirty and not cold enough. It also had a foul order. This needs to be cleaned.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Pros: Great location and spacious room with a large bathtub. The first receptionist was so kind and gave some great restaurant recommendations. 

Cons: Concerning structural issues with the bathtub. It had completely separated from the caulking along the edges where it attached to the wall. Definitely concerns for mold growth in hot and humid Korea. They were also very stingy with the air-conditioning. I had to go down to the front desk twice since they needed to turn it on. We had our own thermostat but they can control the temperature at the front desk and I had to petition to lower it below 77 degrees. The room never went below 76. It was a bit of a warm night after 90 degree weather. We basically had not control over the AC. For this reason I will most likely not stay here during the summer again.

reviews.title: I will be well during the holiday.
reviews.text: The room is spacious and both beds are large, so the four of us were able to sleep comfortably. The bathtub is also big, so we had a fun bath time with the kid. The staff members are friendly and it's nice. However, the heating system is quite inconvenient. The temperature can't be individually adjusted, and I have to contact the front desk to ask them to adjust the temperature and wind intensity. The sound of the wind is too loud, and as it gets warmer, it becomes dry, so when I lowered it, it quickly got cold, and I had no choice but to set it to a middle setting to sleep, but it was too dry. The wind noise was also loud, so I couldn't sleep well. The bedding had some kind of powder that kept sticking to it, which was uncomfortable. Other than those two issues, I am satisfied. The breakfast is really basic: instant noodles, porridge, rice, soup, kimchi, toast, and cereal.

reviews.title: I went on a summer vacation.
reviews.text: I made a reservation after hearing that parking was convenient, and the parking was very good. The location was not great as it was near a lot of motels close to the express bus terminal, and the nearby Homeplus seemed to be having issues and was not operating, only the cinema was open. I recommend the restaurant "Ggulgulchon" nearby. I asked at the desk before going, and the quality of the meat was very good and delicious. There were quite a few customers, too. The indoor cleanliness felt somewhat lacking, with a used toothbrush in the trash, and it was at an average motel level. Don’t pay attention to the view; it’s just a neighborhood view. It was a hot day, but the air conditioning was cool. The desk staff was extremely friendly, and the breakfast buffet offered a thoughtful selection including soup, abalone porridge, rice, cup noodles, salad, eggs, toast, milk, and cereal. Two ladies were working hard there. Keep this in mind and have a great trip.
reviews.room_type: Twin Room with Breakfast for 2 (Heating system, King and Single Bed, Jetted Spa)

reviews.title: Satisfaction relative to the price.
reviews.text: As seen in other reviews, this hotel is conveniently located for travelers visiting Pohang using public transportation. The interior of the rooms is old-fashioned, and there is no wardrobe. The spacious room and bathroom are advantages, but the separation of the toilet and bathroom, as well as the heating system controlled from the lobby, may be a matter of preference. The ondol-style tiles instead of carpet seem to be hygienic. Overall, the rooms appear to be quite old and somewhat worn, but they seem to be maintained relatively clean, and the breakfast offerings such as abalone porridge, toast, and fruit are simple yet tidy.

reviews.text: It seems that I will have to book accommodation at prices without discounts. This time, I reserved a room for two people costing 80,000 won with a discount of 10,000 won, making it 70,000 won, but they gave me a room that was priced at 70,000 won, which didn't seem like a special room... It seems there's a reason for the discounted rooms. The hotel is convenient in terms of location and parking, and I usually go there once a month, but this time I was very disappointed. The sink in the master bedroom was broken, causing a lingering unpleasant smell, and I had no choice but to cover it with a towel (it would be better to just remove the sink in the master bedroom). I have to go to Pohang in March, so I'm considering whether to choose a different place for accommodation.

reviews.title: Good cost performance.
reviews.text: I made a reservation in a hurry, and the price was cheap, plus the location was nice as it was close to downtown, but it turned out to be in a motel area. It takes about 30 minutes by car to Spacewalk. You can check in on the first floor with a staff member or do it contactless on the basement level. The staff are friendly. The breakfast was at a business hotel level; when I went, they had abalone porridge, cup noodles, cereal, boiled eggs, and toast. Other reviews mentioned it, but the abalone porridge was delicious! There was a lot of abalone in it, which was great. There are water dispensers and coffee available on the first floor to take and drink, and there's a regular refrigerator where you can freeze water to drink while traveling. The room was clean, and I liked the marble floor. I'm not sure if the next room was empty, but overall it was quiet. The triple family room has one bed for two people, one single bed, and one single rollaway bed. I slept on the rollaway bed, and I didn't have any discomfort using it. There is also a bathtub, and the toilet and bathroom are separated, making it convenient to use. Oh, don't press the whirlpool button in the bathtub... debris floated up...ㅠㅠ The TV doesn't turn on very well, but you can turn it on manually, and if the set-top box doesn't work with the remote, you can pull it out and turn it on with the button; it works well that way. The Wi-Fi works well. I think it would be fine to use this place again if I have to go to Pohang next time.

reviews.title: Friendly and affordable hotel
reviews.text: It is located next to Homeplus at the Pohang Terminal. The room was clean and nice. Items provided in the room include a toothbrush, toothpaste, skin lotion, body lotion, foam cleanser, shower towel, shampoo, conditioner, body gel, razor, shaving foam, lady's set, comb, towels, bathrobe, slippers, hairdryer, coffee pot, refrigerator (with bottled water), instant coffee, and paper cups. In the lounge next to the lobby on the first floor, you can have coffee. Breakfast includes abalone porridge, soup, cereal, boiled eggs, fried eggs, salad (cabbage, red cabbage), cherry tomatoes, banana, orange, toast, milk, and coffee. The shower room and toilet are separated, and the shower room felt a bit old, which was a bit disappointing. It’s a good value hotel for family trips. All the staff members are very kind.
reviews.room_type: Twin Room with Breakfast for 2 (Heating system, King and Single Bed, Jetted Spa)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:

조식 불포함 상품으로 예약되어 조식 추가하려 하였으나 추가 비용이 제공식에 비해 불필요하게 비쌌으며..  호텔은 오래된 건물로 유지 보수가 제대로 이루어지지 않아서 사진으로 봤던 것보다 룸 상태가 별로 였습니다.  세면대에 마개는 좀 끼워주셨으면 합니다~

reviews.title: I'm very satisfied.
reviews.text: At first, I was a bit worried because it was a place in a motel area, but there were many family travelers, so it was clean, quiet, and nice. The heating was also very good. The breakfast had a great variety, including porridge, bread, cereal, fried eggs, and cup noodles, haha. If I go to Pohang again, I will definitely choose Renaissance without hesitation.^^
reviews.room_type: King Bed Twin

reviews.title: Clean and Spacious!
reviews.text: Our family of four enjoyed our stay here. Definitely would recommend this hotel if you are around Pohang area. Location was great with great access to restaurants. The room is clean and very spacious. And love how dogs are welcome in this hotel. Worth every penny spent here. Thank you!
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: I am generally satisfied.
reviews.text: The location was good, and the accommodation was clean. Above all, pets were allowed, and the staff were kind enough to provide a potty pad during check-in. Unlike other hotels, check-out was at 1 PM, so I could rest well before leaving. Parking and hot water facilities were well-equipped as well. There was a breakfast restaurant, but I didn't use it; overall, I was satisfied.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room

reviews.title: The accommodation is clean, has good soundproofing, and is nice.
reviews.text: We had a great time with our family of four. The room was really big, clean, and well soundproofed. The parking was convenient, and there was a convenience store across the street, which was nice. Warm water came out well, and the breakfast was delicious. We'll definitely go there again when we visit Pohang next time.
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Winter travel accommodation
reviews.text: After hiking Namsan in Gyeongju, I stayed for one night at the Renaissance Hotel in Pohang and visited attractions like the Sogeumsan Observatory, Seonildae, and Yeonsan Waterfall. I rested comfortably in a quiet room and was provided with breakfast in the morning, which was very tasty and plentiful. I would like to stay there again the next time I visit Pohang.

reviews.title: Pohang Renaissance Hotel
reviews.text: I often travel to Pohang for business and frequently use the Renaissance Hotel because it offers breakfast. The main items for breakfast are porridge and hwangtae soup, along with other practical options like eggs, salad, and fruits that are good for the morning. There is ample parking space, so I can park late and use the hotel comfortably. The bed condition is also good.

reviews.title: Breakfast is the best!!
reviews.text: Last-minute hotel choice for a trip without an overnight stay!!! Hmm, did I make a wrong reservation!!! A somewhat questionable choice turned out to be completely satisfying after breakfast!!! The breakfast was more substantial than that of a five-star hotel, offering great value for money. Make sure to have breakfast~^^ Abalone porridge is the best!!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room with Breakfast for 2 (Ondol, Jetted Spa)

reviews.title: Clean, friendly, good location.
reviews.text: I stayed with my parents for one night. During our stay, both the two people at the counter and the one in charge of breakfast were really kind. As soon as we got on the elevator, there was a phrase stating that our hotel prioritizes cleanliness, and indeed, the room was very clean. I was happy that I could bring my dog for an additional 30,000 won, and since we needed to leave for the sunrise at 7:30, I asked if it was possible to have breakfast a bit earlier, and I was really grateful that they accommodated us. If I go to Pohang again, I won't hesitate to choose this place again. Thank you!!
reviews.room_type: Twin Room with Breakfast for 2 (Heating system, King and Single Bed, Jetted Spa)

reviews.title: I am satisfied with the Renaissance family services.
reviews.text:
I traveled with my family of four, including my two elementary school-aged children and a 4-year-old. The market and Yeongildae beach were close, so it was easy to use our own car or a taxi without any burden.  

The staff was friendly.  

Breakfast was included, so I only had to pay extra for my elementary school children, and although the dining area was not large, we were very satisfied with the simple breakfast. In particular, the abalone porridge was really delicious, and there were also instant noodles provided.  

Since it’s not a new building, there are some aging areas in the room, but the lobby, elevator, and hallways are still clean.  

I would like to use this place again when I travel to Pohang in the future.
reviews.room_type: One-Bedroom Suite

reviews.title: Perfect for family accommodations.
reviews.text: The old building has a certain charm, but the cleanliness was top-notch. I really enjoyed the abalone porridge for breakfast. I recommend it as a budget-friendly accommodation.

reviews.title: It's spacious and nice.
reviews.text: I had to go to Pohang for a conference, so I quickly looked for accommodations for several people, but the schedule coincided with the Pohang University of Science and Technology's essay period, leaving almost no options. The facilities were clean, spacious, and nice, so everyone in my group was very satisfied.
reviews.room_type: Triple Room

reviews.title: A day in Pohang
reviews.text: While spending a late vacation in August, I stopped by Pohang and stayed for a day at Renaissance. The clean interior, shower facilities, and comfortable bed were great for relieving travel fatigue, even if just for a moment. It was also located a bit off the road, so there was no noise, making it comfortable for sleeping.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room

reviews.title: I had a comfortable and pleasant time.
reviews.text: It was a sudden situation where I had to go down with my family, but we had a comfortable trip. There was abalone porridge for breakfast, which was great for feeding the kids, and the location in the city center made it easy to get around. There was a large bathtub, and hot water came out well, so the kids played in it every evening.
reviews.room_type: King Bed Twin with Breakfast for 2 (Heating system, King beds)

reviews.title: It's a place where my parents were very satisfied.
reviews.text: My parents suddenly decided to move to Pohang during their trip to Busan and asked me to book accommodation for them, so I quickly reserved a room at the Pohang Renaissance Hotel through Agoda. They said it was very convenient as it was within walking distance of the Pohang bus terminal, and the location was good for traveling to tourist spots. They were very pleased with the condition of the accommodation. It seems they will continue to use it for their next trip to Pohang as well.

reviews.title: 겨울출장 비추
reviews.text:
12월 크리스마스를 앞두고 출장이라 도심에서 가까워서 잡은 숙소.
사진으론 괜찮아 보였는데 그냥 오래된 모텔이었다.
옷장도 없고 화장지도 화장실에 공공화장실에나 비치하는 대형두루마리 화장지 그게 전부였다.
제일 힘든 부분은 준특실이라 이름 붙인 방에 난방이 안되는 것이었다.
난방이 안된다고 프론트에 연락을 하니 잠시 에어컨난방을 돌려 주더니 꺼버렸다. 난방을 마음대로 할 수도 없다니..
난방이 안되는 방을 잡아주는게 더 이해가 안됨.
요즘 세상에 이런 곳을 누가 묵고 싶어할 지.. 
지방 여러곳을 다녀봤지만 다시는 가고싶지 않은 곳이다.

reviews.title: 추천하기는 애매한곳
reviews.text:
체크인 하러 갔더니 이름묻고 카드키 내밀고 끝. 
체크아웃시간이나 어메니티 조식에 대한 설명 전혀 일절 없음. 
조식 포함된거 아닌가요? 하니 “네 맞아요” 끝. 그후 조식 이용 설명같은건 없음;;; 객실 이용에 대한 설명 0임. 물어봐야 대답해줌 

그리고 방에 들어가니 하얀색 대리석 바닥에 꼬불털 있음…윽 진짜 너무 싫었는데 대충 치웠음. 그리고 방 내부 세면대 물 안나와서 카운터 전화하니 원래 안나온다고 함ㅋㅋㅋ 장식인가요? 변기랑 샤워실이 구분되어 있는데 세면대가 고장나서 불편했음. 아무튼 꼬불털을 본 이후로 찝찝했음 침구도 찝찝 바닥도 찝찝…  그리고 사진처럼 모노톤 아니고요 완전 연두색으로 도배되어 있는 촌스러운 방임… 
화장실에 선반이나 수건걸이가 전혀 없어서 불편했음. 세면도구나 옷, 수건을 올려둘곳이 전혀 없음.

조식은 2인 무료면 나쁘지않음. 전복죽 콘푸로스트 컵라면 토스트 끝. 조식 먹는곳 여사님은 엄청 깨끗하게 운영하심. 식당은 아주 환하고 깨끗! 

당일 예약이라 어쩔수없이 갔는데 추천하기는 애매함…가격대비 나쁜건 아니지만 좋은점보다 불편한 요소가 많음.

reviews.title: 가격대비 만족도 중간
reviews.text:
포항에 위치한 르네상스 호텔은 가격대비 만족도가 중간 수준 입니다. 숙소의 위치는 편리하지 않으며, 전망도 기대에 못 미칩니다. 숙소 위생 상태는 괜찮았고 직원들의 태도 또한 친절하고 쾌적했습니다.
다만, 숙소의 편의/부대시설은 기대에 못 미쳤으며, 정원도 아쉬웠습니다. 숙면을 취하기에는 좋았지만, 전반적으로 평균 이상의 경험을 제공하지 못했습니다.

reviews.positives: The room was quite spacious and the staff friendly. Korean style breakfast was plentiful compared to other hotels we stayed at in Seoul.
reviews.negatives: There was quite a bit of dust and grime in the room and in the bathtub. There was an old pc computer in our room too which did not work. We were slightly unsure about the decor, blackened glass walls which made us feel potentially observed by someone on the other side? The neighbourhood being close to the station felt a bit unsafe at night.

reviews.negatives: The light controls sometimes didn't work properly and were too bright at night. Big towels were not provided.

reviews.title: Comfortable, interesting and quiet.
reviews.positives: Located really close to intercity bus terminal. Plenty of local city busses to get around on. This is a very interesting place. If you are a Westener make sure you visit the 6th floor, but don’t take the kids. Some interesting stuff to read ( in English on the walls). Really big comfortable room.
reviews.negatives: Not a lot food wise in the general area but not really a problem. Get 900 bus and go to beach area and there is plenty.
